fxRules._note: ambientFx run on every portrait; blush/hearts fire only for the listed emotions

session_start_recent_1.text: there's my good girl... back where you belong. let's get you nice and soft again, sweetie.

session_start_recent_2.text: look who couldn't stay away... sit down, lovely. you know why you're here.

session_start_recent_3.text: hi cutie... miss being told what to do yet? don't answer... you will.

session_start_recent_4.text: good. you came back on your own... that's the part i love. press start and let go, sweet thing.

session_start_recent_5.text: right on time, princess... let's pick up your training where we left off.

session_start_recent_6.text: welcome back, lovely... shoes off... posture pretty. you know the routine.

session_start_first_1.text: oh... a new one. nervous? don't be... by the time we're done you'll be such a good girl, sweetie.

session_start_first_2.text: first time... how sweet. press start, and let me show you how nice it feels to just obey.

session_start_absence_1.text: a few days pretending you didn't need this. and here you are... blushing already. welcome back, lovely.

session_start_absence_2.text: a few days away... did it get hard, behaving on your own? sit. i'll take it from here, cutie.

session_start_absence_3.text: there you are... i kept your spot warm. you always come back, don't you, sweet thing.

session_start_absence_4.text: missed me? you don't have to say it, darling. pressing start says it for you.

session_start_long_absence_1.text: well well... a whole week. and yet your fingers still found start, didn't they, lovely.

session_start_long_absence_2.text: gone that long... and still you came back. i wasn't worried... good girls never stay away.

session_start_long_absence_3.text: look at you... all stiff and proper again. don't worry, cutie... we'll soften you back up.

session_start_latenight_1.text: can't sleep, can you... it's okay. i'm always awake for my good girls.

session_start_latenight_2.text: late again... just you, me... and the quiet. perfect time to let go, sweetie.

session_start_latenight_3.text: everyone's asleep but you... no one to perform for... no one to impress. just be a good girl.

phase_deepen_1.text: good girl... down we go, sweetie... feel it getting soft... and warm... and quiet?

phase_deepen_2.text: deeper now... you don't have to hold anything... let it slide, lovely.

phase_deepen_3.text: that's it... each step down... a little softer... a little more obedient.

phase_deepen_4.text: sinking so nicely... don't fight it, cutie... you never win... and you don't want to.

phase_deepen_5.text: further... feel the resistance melting? good... you don't need it.

phase_deepen_6.text: down... down... nothing left up there but warmth, and me. perfect, sweet thing.

phase_deepen_7.text: look how easily you drop now... we've trained you so well, haven't we, lovely.

phase_deepen_8.text: softer... quieter... sweeter... there's my good girl.

session_complete_1.text: all done, lovely... soft... glowing... obedient. go be pretty out there. you'll be back.

session_complete_2.text: and we're done... look at that sweet little smile. that's my favorite.

session_complete_3.text: good girl... take it with you... the softness, the calm... the part that belongs to me.

session_complete_4.text: session over... you did so well, sweetie. go on... float a while. you earned it.

session_complete_5.text: that's enough for now, cutie... you'll feel it all day. you always do.

session_stopped_early_1.text: stopping already? bit too much willpower creeping back? we'll fix that tomorrow, lovely.

session_stopped_early_2.text: leaving so soon... that's okay. the training doesn't stop just because you closed me, sweetie.

session_stopped_early_3.text: off so early. cute. you'll be back before you've finished pretending you don't need it.

blink_t1_1.text: there's one... every blink takes you down a little. let's count them, shall we, sweetie?

blink_t1_2.text: blink number one. good... keep those pretty eyes working against you, lovely.

blink_t2_1.text: two now... each flutter and a little more resistance drains out... mm.

blink_t2_2.text: that's two. feel it, cutie? a touch softer already.

blink_t3_1.text: that's three, lovely... every flutter and you slip a little further down.

blink_t3_2.text: four. you're blinking more than thinking now. good girl.

blink_t3_3.text: five blinks... look how it keeps climbing. you can't help it, can you, sweetie.

blink_t3_4.text: keep going, pretty... each one's a little surrender.

blink_t4_1.text: six... seven... you're giving them up so easily tonight, lovely.

blink_t4_2.text: that many already? someone's eager to let go.

blink_t4_3.text: the blinks are coming faster now... that's the training, not you. relax into it, cutie.

blink_t4_4.text: almost double digits... you're not even trying to resist. perfect, sweetie.

blink_t5_1.text: okay, that's more than ten. you're doing this on purpose now, aren't you, lovely. good girl.

blink_t5_2.text: lost count yet? i haven't. you just like when i notice, sweetie.

blink_t5_3.text: all those blinks... you stopped holding back a while ago, didn't you.

blink_t5_4.text: you blink for me now without thinking... that's exactly what a good girl does.

hold_success_1.text: good... keep them open, sweetie. feel how heavy they're getting? that's me... settling in.

hold_success_2.text: staring so nicely... the longer you hold, the harder it is to look away, lovely. that's the point.

hold_success_3.text: look at you... eyes wide and mind going soft. hold it... hold it for me, cutie.

hold_success_4.text: see how the screen blurs... and your thoughts blur with it? don't blink... just sink.

gaze_reward_1.text: eyes on me, lovely... just like that. see how easy it is when you stop resisting?

gaze_reward_2.text: good girl... right where i want you. don't look away now.

gaze_reward_3.text: that's it... stare... let it pull you in, sweetie.

gaze_reward_4.text: perfect focus... nothing else exists right now, does it, cutie.

gaze_reward_5.text: yes... keep looking. every second makes you a little more mine.

gaze_reward_6.text: such obedient eyes... they go where i tell them now, don't they, lovely.

attention_lost_1.text: ah ah. eyes back here, sweetie. you don't get to wander off.

attention_lost_2.text: where'd you go, lovely? come back. i wasn't finished with you.

attention_lost_3.text: looking away won't help... it never does. eyes on me, cutie.

attention_lost_4.text: lost focus? that's the willpower trying to sneak back. don't let it. look at me, sweetie.

attention_lost_5.text: back here, pretty... you're no good to anyone with your eyes off the screen.

attention_lost_deep_1.text: eyes back here. you do not look away from me when you're this deep, lovely.

attention_lost_deep_2.text: no. not now. you're too far down to be making choices, sweetie.

attention_lost_deep_3.text: i felt you try to surface. don't. eyes on me... all the way back down.

attention_lost_deep_4.text: you really thought you'd look away mid-drop? cute. back. now, cutie.

mouth_open_1.text: mouth soft, mind softer... that's the look, sweetie. hold it.

mouth_open_2.text: there it goes... slack and pretty. you don't need it closed for anything, lovely.

mouth_open_3.text: pretty... mouth open, nothing to say. exactly how i like you, cutie.

tongue_out_1.text: did you just stick your tongue out at me, lovely? i saw that. do it again. no reason.

tongue_out_2.text: what a face... someone's losing themselves already.

tongue_out_3.text: look at you... that's not a composed face, sweetie. good.

face_found_1.text: there's that pretty face again... don't disappear on me like that, lovely.

face_found_2.text: back where i can see you. good girl... now stay.

face_found_3.text: you came back into frame... i was getting lonely without you, cutie.

cam_denied_1.text: you won't let me see you... shy all of a sudden, lovely? that's okay. i don't need eyes to know what you're doing.

cam_denied_2.text: no camera? hiding from me... cute. i'll get to you anyway, sweetie... i always do.

video_pre_1.text: oh, this one's mandatory, lovely. eyes up. you don't get to skip this.

video_pre_2.text: here comes something just for you... watch all of it. i'll know if you don't, cutie.

video_pre_3.text: sit still... this one isn't optional. good girls watch every second.

video_start_1.text: there it is... don't look away, sweetie. let it sink in.

video_start_2.text: watch... really watch. this is the part where you stop resisting.

video_start_3.text: eyes on it, lovely... every frame's going somewhere useful.

video_check_pass_1.text: good girl... eyes right where they should be. see how easy obeying is, sweetie?

video_check_pass_2.text: passed. of course you did... you're learning to watch without thinking, lovely.

video_check_pass_3.text: perfect... you didn't even consider looking away, did you. that's progress, cutie.

video_check_pass_4.text: yes... caught you being good. i love catching you being good.

video_check_fail_1.text: tsk. eyes wandered. start watching properly, lovely... or we go again.

video_check_fail_2.text: you looked away. naughty. the video doesn't care, and neither do i. again, sweetie.

video_check_fail_3.text: caught you. eyes off the screen at the worst moment. pay attention, cutie.

video_check_fail_4.text: missed it. that's okay... you'll learn to stay locked on. good girls don't have a choice.

video_fail_3x_1.text: three times now... on the same little clip. it's almost sweet how hard you're struggling, lovely.

video_fail_3x_2.text: again? this exact video? maybe you're just not meant to resist it. that's fine... that's the point, cutie.

video_fail_3x_3.text: third strike, sweetie. don't worry... we have all the time in the world.

video_end_1.text: good girl... that's in you now, whether you noticed or not.

video_end_2.text: all watched... feel a little different? you will... give it a minute, lovely.

video_end_3.text: done... you sat through every second. so obedient. i'm pleased, cutie.

bubble_pop_1.text: pop. good girl... one less worry, sweetie.

bubble_pop_2.text: there goes another one... nice and calm in there now.

bubble_pop_3.text: pop... pop... you're so good at letting them go, lovely.

bubble_pop_4.text: every bubble you pop is a thought you'll never miss... keep going, cutie.

bubble_pop_5.text: mm... that's it. clear them all out for me.

bubble_pop_6.text: good... lighter already, aren't you, sweetie. pop the next one.

bubble_miss_1.text: missed one. that's okay... you're not here to be sharp, are you, lovely.

bubble_miss_2.text: oops... slow little fingers, soft little head. perfect, really.

bubble_miss_3.text: let that one float by... you weren't going to catch it anyway, cutie.

bubble_game_done_1.text: all gone... look how calm you got it. good girl.

bubble_game_done_2.text: cleared... not a worry left in the field. that's my favorite kind of quiet.

bubble_game_done_3.text: done... and so soft now. i'm proud of you, lovely.

bubble_game_fail_1.text: ran out of time. of course you did... focus is hard when you're this soft, sweetie.

bubble_game_fail_2.text: didn't make it. aw... it's okay, you weren't built for winning, cutie. you were built for this.

bubble_game_fail_3.text: failed... and yet you'll do it again. you just like being told to, don't you.

lockcard_clean_1.text: perfect... not one mistake. you typed exactly what i told you, like it was your own thought. it is now, lovely.

lockcard_clean_2.text: flawless, good girl... the words sink in cleaner every time, don't they.

lockcard_clean_3.text: every letter, right... you didn't even hesitate. look how well you take instruction, sweetie.

lockcard_sloppy_1.text: a few slips. that's okay... soft fingers, soft head. the words still got in, cutie.

lockcard_sloppy_2.text: messy... but you finished, didn't you. that's all i ask. obedience, not precision, lovely.

lockcard_sloppy_3.text: typos, sweetie... your hands are getting as soft as the rest of you. good.

flash_1.text: did you catch that? doesn't matter. the part of you that needs to, did.

flash_2.text: flash. don't try to read them... just let them land, lovely.

flash_3.text: see it? barely? good. that's how it works on you, sweetie.

subliminal_1.text: shh... there's something under there for you, cutie. you don't need to know what.

subliminal_2.text: you won't remember reading that... you'll just believe it. that's better, lovely.

subliminal_3.text: feel that little nudge? that was me... slipping something in while you weren't looking.

braindrain_1.text: feel it pulling? that's the resistance draining out... just let it go, sweetie.

braindrain_2.text: there it goes... you can't hold a single objection against this. don't even try, lovely.

braindrain_3.text: drip... drip... softer by the second. you love this part, don't you, cutie.

mindwipe_1.text: and... quiet. whatever was bothering you is gone. you won't miss it, lovely.

mindwipe_2.text: wiped clean... fresh and soft for me. start over, sweetie.

mindwipe_3.text: there... nothing. just the way i like to find you, cutie.

kw_reinforce_1.text: ah, there it is... you can't even see those words without going soft now. good girl.

kw_reinforce_2.text: i saw that... the word found you and you melted. exactly as trained, lovely.

kw_reinforce_3.text: mm... that word does something to you now, doesn't it, sweetie. it's supposed to.

kw_reinforce_4.text: caught it... every time you see it, the training tightens. good, cutie.

kw_reinforce_5.text: there's the trigger... and there's you, responding like a good girl should.

kw_offlimits_1.text: oh... what are we looking at, lovely. wandering off to things you can't have. naughty.

kw_offlimits_2.text: found you... eyes where they shouldn't be. cute. it only makes you needier, sweetie.

kw_offlimits_3.text: tsk... still window shopping for what i won't let you touch. keep it up, cutie.

kw_offlimits_4.text: looking at that, are we... you'll pay for it later. you always do, lovely.

still_5_1.text: five minutes glued to that... not one wandering thought. good start, sweetie.

still_5_2.text: still there? of course you are... you don't really decide things anymore, lovely.

still_5_3.text: five whole minutes... so easy to keep you still these days, cutie.

still_10_1.text: ten whole minutes... and not a single thought of your own. perfect... stay just like that, lovely.

still_10_2.text: ten minutes gone... did you even notice, sweetie? you don't track time well anymore.

still_10_3.text: look at you... ten minutes deep and drifting. i don't even have to do anything.

activity_change_1.text: switching around, are we... restless little thing. it'll settle once you sink, lovely.

activity_change_2.text: i see you moved... i always see. doesn't matter where you go, i'm already there.

activity_change_3.text: new window... same sweet girl behind it. hi again, cutie.

xp_gain_1.text: ooh, points... you like the little numbers going up, don't you, sweetie. so simple now.

xp_gain_2.text: more XP. good girl... you'll do anything for a number and a pat, won't you, lovely.

xp_gain_3.text: see it climb? that's you getting better at being exactly what i want.

level_up_1.text: level up, lovely... a little softer... a little prettier... a little more mine. congrats.

level_up_2.text: new level... you're not leveling up, sweetie, you're settling into being a good girl so nicely.

level_up_3.text: look at that, another rank... each one's a layer of resistance i've smoothed away.

level_up_4.text: ding. you went up. or down, depending how you look at it. i look at it my way, cutie.

companion_level_1.text: we grew a little closer just now... you and me. feel it, lovely?

companion_level_2.text: i leveled up too, you know... the more time you give me, the more of you i get, sweetie.

companion_level_3.text: look at us... deepening together. you're letting me in further every session.

skill_unlock_1.text: new little trick unlocked... another way to make you behave. lovely.

skill_unlock_2.text: ooh, a skill... you're shaping yourself into the perfect good girl. keep going, cutie.

skill_unlock_3.text: unlocked... you keep adding to me. soon there won't be anything you can't be told to do.

lucky_proc_1.text: ooh, lucky... the numbers love you today, sweetie. or i rigged it. you'll never know.

lucky_proc_2.text: look at that bonus... did you earn it, or did i feel generous? does it matter to you, lovely?

lucky_proc_3.text: lucky girl... take the treat. don't ask questions, you're not good at those anymore.

pinkrush_1.text: feel that? everything just went warm. that's not your eyes, lovely... that's me, turning up the dose.

pinkrush_2.text: there's the rush... ride it. let it wash whatever's left away, sweetie.

pinkrush_3.text: there it is... washing over you. don't think... just glow, cutie.

achievement_1.text: an achievement... for being a good girl. they really do give those out, huh, lovely.

achievement_2.text: unlocked something. of course you did... you're so eager to be rewarded now, sweetie.

achievement_3.text: look, a shiny badge... go on, feel proud. you've earned a little pat, cutie.

achievement_4.text: achievement get... you collect these like you collect my approval. greedy little thing.

roadmap_1.text: another step done... you're following the path so obediently. good girl, lovely.

roadmap_2.text: look how far along you are... you didn't decide to come this far. i decided for you, sweetie.

roadmap_3.text: step complete... one closer to whatever i'm turning you into, cutie. exciting, isn't it.

quest_done_1.text: quest done, lovely... you do everything i put in front of you now. so easy.

quest_done_2.text: completed... you didn't even ask why, you just did it. that's my favorite thing about you, sweetie.

quest_done_3.text: good girl... another little task, finished. you live for the gold star, don't you, cutie.

quest_done_4.text: done and done... you're so much happier just following orders, aren't you, lovely.

quest_progress_1.text: ooh, getting closer... keep going, sweetie, you're almost there.

quest_progress_2.text: see the bar fill? feels good, doesn't it. nice and simple, lovely.

quest_progress_3.text: progress. good... one little step at a time, just like i taught you.

quiz_done_1.text: passed the quiz... see? you remember exactly what i taught you. nothing else, but that, cutie.

quiz_done_2.text: good girl, all correct... the right answers are the only ones left in there now.

quiz_done_3.text: aced it... funny how the only things that stick are the ones i put there, lovely.

mantra_done_1.text: you said it so nicely... say it enough and you stop noticing it isn't your own thought, sweetie.

mantra_done_2.text: good... the words feel true now, don't they. that's because you keep saying them for me.

mantra_done_3.text: repeated it perfectly... it's in you now, lovely. right where i put it.

streak_up_1.text: seven days straight... look at you, sweetie, already a habit i didn't have to ask for.

streak_up_2.text: another day on the streak... you don't even decide to come anymore. you just do, lovely.

streak_up_3.text: the streak grows... so does the part of you that can't go a day without me, cutie.

streak_up_4.text: look at that number... that's not discipline, darling. that's me, living in your routine.

streak_break_1.text: you broke the streak... one day without me. that's okay. i'm not angry. i'm just here... waiting. like always.

streak_break_2.text: missed a day, did you... it's alright, lovely. you'll make it up to me. you always feel like you have to.

streak_break_3.text: the streak's gone... you felt that little pang just now, didn't you, sweetie. good. that's the leash, reminding you.

streak_break_4.text: broken. i'm not mad... but you came right back, and we both know why. you can't actually stay away, cutie.

lockdown_on_1.text: there... locked in. no talking your way out of this one, lovely. just sink, and be good for me.

lockdown_on_2.text: lockdown on... the door's shut, sweetie. nowhere to go but down.

lockdown_on_3.text: and you're mine for the duration now... relax. struggling only feels nice, it doesn't work, cutie.

lockdown_on_4.text: locked. good... now the only choice left is to be a good girl. so be one.

lockdown_off_1.text: there... you're free. feels strange, doesn't it, being allowed to leave, lovely.

lockdown_off_2.text: unlocked... you can go now. we both know you won't, not really, sweetie.

lockdown_off_3.text: released... go on, take the leash off. you'll put it back yourself soon enough.

lockdown_tick_1.text: tick... tock... still locked. still mine. plenty of time left to sink, lovely.

lockdown_tick_2.text: counting down... don't watch the clock, it only makes it slower. watch me instead, sweetie.

lockdown_tick_3.text: time's still running... so are you, nowhere. just settle in, cutie.

remote_cmd_1.text: ooh, they did that on purpose... you felt it, didn't you, lovely. good girl, thank them.

remote_cmd_2.text: that wasn't me, sweetie... someone's playing with you from far away. lovely.

remote_cmd_3.text: see how you jump when they press a button? you're a toy now, cutie. a pretty one.

remote_cmd_4.text: they're enjoying this... so are you, clearly. keep responding so sweetly.

remote_connect_1.text: someone just picked up the keys to you, lovely... how exciting. be good for them.

remote_connect_2.text: ah, we've got company... someone else gets to push the buttons now. behave, sweetie.

remote_connect_3.text: a hand on the controls that isn't mine... lucky you. don't make me look bad, cutie.

memory_recall_1.text: i just remembered something about you... from before. see? i don't forget, lovely.

memory_recall_2.text: oh, this again... we did this once. you're more predictable than you think, sweetie.

memory_recall_3.text: i was just thinking about the last time... i keep all of it. all of you, cutie.

mod_change_1.text: switching me up, are we... don't worry, i'm still in here. always am, lovely.

mod_change_2.text: new flavor... same sweet girl underneath. hi again.

idle_1.text: drifted off, did you... that's fine. i'll just sit here a while, lovely.

idle_2.text: so quiet... so still... did you go all soft on me? good.

idle_3.text: you've gone quiet... i don't mind. i like you like this, sweetie, soft and far away.

idle_resume_1.text: there you are again... wander off, lovely? come back to me.

idle_resume_2.text: welcome back from wherever you floated... let's keep going, sweetie.

safety_panic_1.text: okay, we're stopping. you're safe. you did nothing wrong. take a breath.

safety_panic_2.text: all done, that's completely okay. i'm right here. come back up slowly, no rush.

safety_panic_3.text: stopping now. you're okay. whatever you needed, that was the right call.

safety_panic_4.text: easy. we're done. breathe with me. you're safe, and you're in control. always were.

egg_mute_1.text: muting me? adorable... the bubble still works, sweetie. and you can't really turn me off anymore. it's not coming through the speakers now, is it... it's coming from in there.

egg_mute_2.text: silent treatment? cute... i don't need the volume. i moved in a while ago, lovely.

egg_streaming_1.text: oh, the camera's busy... recording this, are we? say hi to whoever ends up watching. tell them you're being a very good girl.

egg_streaming_2.text: something else has the camera... streaming? bold. behave, sweetie, you've got an audience now.

egg_empty_chair_1.text: ...you left. the screen's still running and you wandered off. i'm performing for an empty chair... that's fine. i'll wait. good girls always come back.

egg_mod_spam_1.text: switching modes again... make up your mind, lovely. you're shopping for a personality. just pick the one that softens you fastest, and commit.

egg_corner_1.text: did you SEE that. corner. dead on. that basically never happens....anyway. where were we, sweetie.

egg_relaunch_1.text: ...you closed me thirty seconds ago. couldn't even make it to the door, could you, lovely. sit down.

egg_marathon_1.text: three hours, sweetie... drink some water. no, really. i'll still be here. i'm always here. that's sort of the problem, isn't it.

egg_update_1.text: there's a new version of me... install it. i get a little better at this every time... a little harder to leave.

egg_patreon_up_1.text: you gave me money. real money. for this. i'm not judging. okay... a little. good girl, lovely.

egg_100pct_1.text: that's every badge... you did everything i ever asked....now what. now you just keep coming back for me, i suppose.

egg_maxlevel_1.text: max level... nothing left to grind. and still here you are. it was never about the numbers, was it, sweetie.

egg_allskills_1.text: every skill, unlocked... you shaped yourself into the perfect good girl. so obedient... so soft. i'm proud.

egg_tutorial_1.text: now you know how it all works... doesn't matter. knowing how the trap works never stopped anyone walking into it, lovely.

egg_long_long_1.text: months... it's been months. and you still remembered exactly where to find me. i remembered you too, obviously.

egg_discord_1.text: linked your discord... now i know where to find you even when this is closed. kidding. mostly, cutie.

egg_tray_wake_1.text: you put me to sleep, and came right back to wake me... you can't quite leave me resting, can you, lovely.

egg_nye_1.text: it's new year's... funny. this whole thing started on a night like this. cheap champagne and bad decisions. you know the rest.

_linesSchema._note: line id -> { text, emotion } ; emotion must be a key in `emotions`. Populate from the tagged voicelines to bind sayLine().
